failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro hf
    sorry
  · intro hf w x y z hw hx hy hz hwxyz
    rcases hf with hf | hf <;>
    · simp only [hf w hw, hf x hx, hf (y^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hy), hf (z^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hz)]
      have h1 : w ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_pos hw
      have h2 : x ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_pos hx  
      have h3 : y ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_pos hy
      have h4 : z ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_pos hz
      have h5 : (w * x) ^ 2 = (y * z) ^ 2 := by rw [hwxyz]
      field_simp
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (w * z - x * y), sq_nonneg (w * z + x * y)]

constructor
  · intro hf
    sorry
  · intro hf w x y z hw hx hy hz hwxyz
    rcases hf with hid | hinv
    · simp only [hid w hw, hid x hx, hid (y^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hy), hid (z^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hz)]
    · have hfw : f w = 1 / w := hinv w hw
      have hfx : f x = 1 / x := hinv x hx  
      have hfy2 : f (y^2) = 1 / (y^2) := hinv (y^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hy)
      have hfz2 : f (z^2) = 1 / (z^2) := hinv (z^2) (sq_pos_of_pos hz)
      rw [hfw, hfx, hfy2, hfz2]
      have h1 : w * x = y * z := hwxyz
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      have h2 : w^2 * x^2 = y^2 * z^2 := by nlinarith
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg w, sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg z]
